description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a striking yellow exterior accented by black detailing. The body features smooth, flowing curves and aggressive lines, with a prominent black roof and engine cover that contrast sharply with the yellow paint. The car sits on large, black multi-spoke wheels with visible yellow brake calipers, emphasizing its racing pedigree. The front end is characterized by sharp, angular headlights and a wide, low-set grille, while the rear showcases a sculpted tail with integrated taillights and a subtle rear spoiler. The side profile reveals deep air intakes and a cockpit-style cabin with tinted windows. This vehicle is designed for speed and agility, typical of modern supercars seen in urban luxury environments.
description: A yellow and black, low-profile sports car with aerodynamic curves, large black multi-spoke wheels, and aggressive styling. It features a sculpted body, tinted windows, and a subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the black engine cover, integrated taillights, and subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the deep air intake, black multi-spoke wheels, and yellow brake calipers.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the sharp headlights, wide grille, and smooth hood contours.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the aerodynamic lines and wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: black multi-spoke rims with a split-spoke pattern and visible yellow brake calipers
